proposal_summary: A proposal to renew Gauntlet's 12-month continuous market risk management engagement with Aave, covering V2, V3, GHO, and an insolvency refund.

disclosed_entities.name: Gauntlet
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: A proposal to renew Gauntlet’s 12-month engagement with Aave

disclosed_entities.name: aUSDT
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The annual fee will be a fixed fee of $1,600,000. This will be 50% in GHO and 50% in aUSDT.

disclosed_entities.name: GHO
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The remaining 320,000 in aUSDT and 800,000 GHO will be streamed linearly over 1 year.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Deposit 480,000 aUSDT in a vault for the insolvency refund
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Sets aside 30% of the total annual fee in a vault to act as an insolvency refund.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: 30% of the total annual fee (480,000 in aUSDT) will be deposited in a vault for the insolvency refund.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Stream 320,000 aUSDT and 800,000 GHO linearly over 1 year
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Pays Gauntlet's remaining service fee progressively over 12 months.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The remaining 320,000 in aUSDT and 800,000 GHO will be streamed linearly over 1 year.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal only consists of transferring and streaming specific token amounts to compensate a service provider.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: The Proposal Payload does the following: 30% of the total annual fee (480,000 in aUSDT) will be deposited... The remaining 320,000 in aUSDT and 800,000 GHO will be streamed linearly over 1 year.

limitations: No specific smart contract addresses or vault addresses are provided in the proposal text.
Functions and stream mechanics are not explicitly detailed, only described conceptually.
